## 🧱 SECTION 2: TECHNICAL CORE
### DiceService Interface
```typescript
export interface RollResult {
  total: number;
  natural: number;
  isCrit: boolean;
  isFumble: boolean;
}
// Logic: Always audit to 'rpc_audit_logs' table.
```

### MAGIA & GRIMÓRIO
*Synthetic Data Representation (Sample):*
```yaml
spells:
  - id: "bola_de_fogo"
    circle: 1
    cost: 2
    damage: "3d6 Fogo"
    tags: ["Area", "Evocação"]
    ref: "GDD_12_SPELL_042"
  [... all 100+ spells in this compact format ...]
```

```
